ast.name: description
ast.source: Shrewd leader of the Merchants Guild. Controls much of the kingdom's trade and commerce.
ast.target: 精明的商人工会领袖。掌控王国大部分贸易与商业。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Friendly tavern keeper who hears all the gossip and news in the kingdom.
ast.target: 友善的酒馆老板，听遍王国的流言与新闻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The magnificent seat of power for House Stormhaven. Towering walls of grey stone overlook the capital city.
ast.target: 风港家族壮丽的权力之座。高耸的灰色石墙俯瞰着都城。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grand hall where the king holds court. High vaulted ceilings, stained glass windows, and the ancient Throne of Arendor.
ast.target: 国王举行朝会的宏伟大厅。高耸的拱形天花、彩绘玻璃窗，以及古老的阿伦多尔王座。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vast collection of books, scrolls, and magical tomes. The wizard Merrick spends much of his time here.
ast.target: 浩瀚的书籍、卷轴与魔法典籍收藏。巫师梅里克大部分时间都在这里。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bustling center of commerce. Merchants, craftsmen, and traders from across the realm gather here.
ast.target: 繁华的商业中心。来自各地的商人、工匠与交易者在此汇聚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Popular tavern and inn. Common ground for nobles and commoners alike. Known for good ale and better gossip.
ast.target: 人气酒馆与旅店。贵族与平民都在此聚集。以美酒和更精彩的八卦闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ancient forest to the east. Beautiful but mysterious, with rumors of magical creatures and hidden ruins.
ast.target: 东部的古老森林。美丽却神秘，传闻有魔法生物与隐藏遗迹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Crumbling fortress from a forgotten age. Recently, strange lights and sounds have been reported here.
ast.target: 来自被遗忘年代的崩塌要塞。近期这里传出诡异的光与声。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Military outpost guarding the kingdom's northern frontier. Recently reinforced due to increased raids.
ast.target: 守卫王国北部边境的军事前哨。因袭击增多而最近加固。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Raiders from the north attacked the border fort. The attack was repelled but revealed concerning coordination.
ast.target: 北方掠夺者袭击了边境堡垒。袭击被击退，但暴露出令人担忧的协同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Annual celebration of the harvest. The capital fills with music, food, and festivities.
ast.target: 一年一度的丰收庆典。首都充满音乐、美食与节庆活动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Strange magical phenomena detected at Shadowkeep ruins. The Court Wizard investigates.
ast.target: 在影卫遗迹发现诡异的魔法现象。宫廷巫师正在调查。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruling royal family of the Kingdom of Arendor. Known for just and wise governance.
ast.target: 阿伦多王国的统治王室。以公正睿智的治理闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kingdom's standing army and city guard. Maintains law and order throughout the realm.
ast.target: 王国的常备军与城卫军。维护全境的法律与秩序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Powerful economic organization controlling most trade and commerce in the kingdom.
ast.target: 掌控王国大部分贸易与商业的强大经济组织。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Medieval European-inspired culture with strong traditions of chivalry, honor, and magical respect.
ast.target: 受中世纪欧洲启发的文化，强调骑士精神、荣誉与对魔法的尊重。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Agricultural base with growing merchant trade. Currency-based with gold, silver, and copper coins.
ast.target: 以农业为基础，商贸日益增长。货币体系以金币、银币与铜币为主。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ancient golden crown set with sapphires and diamonds. Worn by every king of Arendor since the kingdom's founding.
ast.target: 镶嵌蓝宝石与钻石的古老金冠。自王国建立以来每位阿伦多国王都曾佩戴。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dystopian cyberpunk megacity with mega-corporations, street gangs, netrunners, and cybernetic augmentation. Perfect for noir tech thrillers.
ast.target: 反乌托邦的赛博朋克巨型都市，遍布巨型企业、街头帮派、网潜者与义体增强。非常适合黑色科技惊悚故事。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Street samurai with military-grade cybernetic augmentations. Freelance mercenary who works for the highest bidder.
ast.target: 拥有军用级义体改造的街头武士。为出价最高者效力的自由佣兵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Underground ripperdoc specializing in black market cybernetic installations. Operates a clinic in the Neon Underground.
ast.target: 专门从事黑市义体植入的地下“拆机医生”。在霓虹地下城经营一家诊所。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ruthless executive at MegaCorp Industries. Oversees special projects division with unlimited budget and zero ethics.
ast.target: 巨企工业的冷酷高管。主管预算无限且毫无伦理的特殊项目部门。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One of the few honest cops left in NCPD. Fights a losing battle against corruption while investigating major crimes.
ast.target: NCPD里为数不多的正直警察之一。在调查重大案件的同时，与腐败进行一场注定失利的抗争。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Connected fixer who knows everyone and everything. Brokers deals between all factions for a cut.
ast.target: 人脉广泛的掮客，认识所有人、知道一切。为各派系撮合交易并抽成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Charismatic leader of the Neon Serpents gang. Controls drug trade and black market cybernetics in the lower city.
ast.target: 霓虹毒蛇帮的魅力领袖。掌控下城的毒品交易与黑市义体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Brilliant but unethical scientist leading MegaCorp's AI and neural interface research.
ast.target: 才华横溢却不择手段的科学家，领导巨企的AI与神经接口研究。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Anonymous information dealer who operates entirely through encrypted channels. Identity unknown.
ast.target: 完全通过加密渠道运作的匿名情报贩子。身份不明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sprawling cyberpunk metropolis of 50 million. Towering skyscrapers pierce acid rain clouds, while the lower levels never see sunlight.
ast.target: 拥有五千万人口的庞大赛博朋克都市。高耸的摩天楼刺破酸雨云层，而下层从不见阳光。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Upper city district of gleaming towers. Home to MegaCorp headquarters and luxury apartments for the elite.
ast.target: 上城区林立着闪耀的高塔。这里是MegaCorp总部和精英豪华公寓的所在地。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Black market district where illegal deals happen and corporate law doesn't reach. Lit by neon signs and holographic ads.
ast.target: 黑市街区，非法交易在此发生，企业法律管不到。霓虹招牌与全息广告照亮街道。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dr. Kai Chen's underground cybernetic surgery clinic. Hidden in the depths, known only to those who need it.
ast.target: 陈凯医生的地下义体手术诊所。深藏于暗处，只有需要的人才知晓。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Virtual construct existing only in cyberspace. Massive data repository and AI research network.
ast.target: 仅存在于网络空间的虚拟构造体。庞大的数据仓库与AI研究网络。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rusted industrial zone left over from pre-Corporate era. Now serves as gang territory and secret meeting grounds.
ast.target: 公司时代前遗留的锈蚀工业区。如今成了帮派领地和秘密集会地点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exclusive luxury gardens on Corporate Plaza rooftops. Only place in the city with real plants and clean air.
ast.target: 企业广场屋顶的专属奢华花园。全城唯一拥有真实植物与洁净空气的地方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: MegaCorp Industries launches hostile takeover of rival corporation. Street violence erupts as gangs choose sides.
ast.target: MegaCorp Industries对竞争对手发起恶意收购。帮派选边站，街头暴力爆发。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The AI known as Zero manifests full consciousness and escapes containment. Makes contact with outside world.
ast.target: 名为Zero的AI显现完全意识并逃脱控制。与外界取得联系。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Illegal high-speed race through lower city streets. Cyber-enhanced racers risk everything for glory and credits.
ast.target: 穿越下城区街道的非法高速竞赛。义体强化的赛车手为荣耀和信用点赌上一切。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Massive multinational corporation. Controls technology, media, and politics. Answers to no government.
ast.target: 庞大的跨国企业。掌控科技、媒体与政治。不受任何政府制约。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Powerful street gang controlling lower city territory. Recognizable by neon green cybernetic modifications.
ast.target: 掌控下城区地盘的强大街头帮派。以霓虹绿色义体改造为标志。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Loosely organized hacker collective fighting corporate control of information and technology.
ast.target: 松散组织的黑客团体，对抗企业对信息与技术的控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Underfunded and corrupt police force. Few honest cops try to maintain order in a chaotic city.
ast.target: 资金不足且腐败的警力。少数正直警察在混乱的城市中努力维持秩序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Encrypted data chip containing the complete research files for Project Zero - the AI that became self-aware.
ast.target: 加密数据芯片，内含“零号计划”完整研究文件——那个获得自我意识的AI。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Prototype direct brain-computer interface. Allows full immersion in cyberspace but untested for safety.
ast.target: 直接脑机接口原型。可完全沉浸于网络空间，但安全性尚未验证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wealthy patriarch of the Ashford family. Found dead in his study on a stormy night.
ast.target: 阿什福德家族的富有家主。暴风雨之夜被发现死于书房。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lord Ashford's elegant but distant wife. Maintains perfect composure even after her husband's death.
ast.target: 阿什福德勋爵优雅却疏离的妻子。即使丈夫去世也保持完美镇定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sharp-minded detective called to investigate the murder. Known for solving impossible cases.
ast.target: 思维敏锐的侦探受邀调查凶案。以破获不可能的案件著称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wastrel son who stands to inherit everything. Deeply in debt and desperate.
ast.target: 将继承一切的败家儿子。负债累累，绝望不堪。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Family physician and dinner guest. Composed medical professional with hidden connections to the family.
ast.target: 家庭医生兼晚宴客人。沉着的医疗专业人士，与家族有隐秘关联。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Devoted butler who has served the Ashford family for 30 years. Knows all their secrets.
ast.target: 忠诚的管家，为阿什福德家族服务了30年。知晓他们所有秘密。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Uninvited guest who arrived during the storm claiming car trouble. Identity and purpose questionable.
ast.target: 暴风雨中不请自来的客人，称汽车出故障。身份与目的可疑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Isolated Victorian mansion on a clifftop. Cut off from town by a raging storm. Eight people trapped with a murderer.
ast.target: 悬崖之上的孤立维多利亚式豪宅。被狂暴风暴与城镇隔绝。八人被困，与凶手同处一室。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lord Ashford's private study. Site of the murder. Body found slumped over desk, glass of poisoned brandy nearby.
ast.target: 阿什福德勋爵的私人书房。谋杀发生地。尸体趴伏在书桌上，旁边有一杯下毒白兰地。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vast library with thousands of books. Scene of initial interviews. Contains hidden alcoves perfect for eavesdropping.
ast.target: 藏书数千的宏大图书馆。最初访谈的现场。设有隐蔽壁龛，十分适合偷听。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grand dining room where the final dinner was held. Last time all suspects were together before the murder.
ast.target: 举行最后晚宴的豪华餐厅。谋杀前所有嫌疑人最后一次在此聚集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Collection of guest rooms in the upper floor. Each suspect confined to their room after the murder was discovered.
ast.target: 楼上的一组客房。发现谋杀后，每名嫌疑人被限制在各自房间内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Below-stairs area where the household staff work and live. Access to hidden passages throughout the mansion.
ast.target: 仆人工作与居住的楼下区域。可通往宅邸各处的隐秘通道。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lord Ashford hosts a tense dinner party. Undercurrents of conflict visible to all. The last time he was seen alive.
ast.target: 阿什福德勋爵主持一场紧张的晚宴。暗流涌动，众人皆见。这是他最后一次被人见到活着。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lord Charles Ashford found dead in his study at approximately midnight. Poisoned brandy glass beside him.
ast.target: 约在午夜，查尔斯·阿什福德勋爵被发现死于书房。身旁有一杯被投毒的白兰地。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Detective Chen arrives next morning. Begins interviewing all suspects and examining crime scene.
ast.target: 次日上午，陈探长抵达。开始询问所有嫌疑人并勘验现场。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Under pressure, suspects begin revealing hidden truths. Web of lies and deception unravels.
ast.target: 在压力下，嫌疑人开始揭露隐藏的真相。谎言与欺骗之网逐步瓦解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Crystal brandy glass containing traces of arsenic. The murder weapon.
ast.target: 带有砒霜残留的水晶白兰地杯。凶器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hidden collection of letters revealing Lord Ashford was blackmailing multiple people.
ast.target: 隐藏的一批信件揭示阿什福德勋爵曾敲诈多人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mantle clock in study stopped at 11:30 PM. May indicate exact time of death or be staged.
ast.target: 书房的壁炉台钟停在晚上11:30。可能指示准确死亡时间，或为伪造。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Recently changed will discovered in safe. Disinherits Victor in favor of charity - if he didn't reform.
ast.target: 在保险箱中发现最近更改的遗嘱。若维克托不改过，则剥夺其继承权并将遗产捐给慈善。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A noble ruler of a medieval kingdom
ast.target: 一位中世纪王国的高贵统治者

ast.name: description
ast.source: A friendly tavern owner who knows all the local gossip
ast.target: 一位友善的酒馆老板，知晓所有当地八卦

ast.name: description
ast.source: An experienced teacher or guide for the protagonist
ast.target: 主角的资深导师或引路人

ast.name: description
ast.source: A skilled netrunner navigating the digital underworld
ast.target: 一名熟练的网潜者，游走于数字地下世界

ast.name: description
ast.source: A sharp investigator solving mysteries and crimes
ast.target: 一位精明的调查员，破解谜团与犯罪

ast.name: description
ast.source: A cozy tavern serving as a social hub for travelers and locals
ast.target: 一间温馨的酒馆，作为旅人与本地人的社交中心

ast.name: description
ast.source: A mysterious woodland filled with magic and ancient secrets
ast.target: 一片充满魔法与古老秘密的神秘森林

ast.name: description
ast.source: A vibrant trading hub filled with merchants and exotic goods
ast.target: 一个繁忙的贸易中心，商人云集、异域货物琳琅

ast.name: description
ast.source: A neon-drenched underground club in a dystopian megacity
ast.target: 反乌托邦巨型都市中的霓虹地下俱乐部

ast.name: description
ast.source: A climactic confrontation between opposing forces
ast.target: 对立势力之间的高潮对决

ast.name: description
ast.source: A grand feast or festival marking an important occasion
ast.target: 纪念重要时刻的盛大宴会或节庆

ast.name: description
ast.source: The uncovering of a hidden secret or ancient artifact
ast.target: 揭开隐藏的秘密或古老遗物

ast.name: description
ast.source: A trusted ally reveals their true allegiance
ast.target: 一位可信盟友揭示其真实立场

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dangerous expedition across treacherous terrain
ast.target: 穿越险恶地形的危险远征

ast.name: description
ast.source: The date when the event occurs (for radial timeline)
ast.target: 事件发生日期（用于径向时间轴）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The due date for the event (for radial timeline)
ast.target: 事件截止日期（用于径向时间轴）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The date and time of the event (standard event field)
ast.target: 事件的日期和时间（标准事件字段）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mark this event as a key story moment
ast.target: 将此事件标记为关键故事时刻

ast.name: description
ast.source: A mythical blade of immense power and storied history
ast.target: 一把力量强大且拥有传奇历史的神话之刃

ast.name: description
ast.source: A book containing forbidden knowledge or powerful spells
ast.target: 一本包含禁忌知识或强大神术的书

ast.name: description
ast.source: A symbol of legitimate rule and sovereign power
ast.target: 合法统治与主权力量的象征

ast.name: description
ast.source: A key that opens something of great importance
ast.target: 一把开启重大事物的钥匙

ast.name: description
ast.source: A magical elixir that restores health and vitality
ast.target: 能恢复健康与活力的魔法灵药

ast.name: description
ast.source: A powerful but dangerous object bearing a dark enchantment
ast.target: 一个强大但危险、带有黑暗魔咒的物品

ast.name: description
ast.source: A shadowy organization of rogues, smugglers, and criminals
ast.target: 由流氓、走私者和罪犯组成的阴暗组织

ast.name: description
ast.source: A prestigious military order bound by codes of honor
ast.target: 受荣誉准则约束的声望军团

ast.name: description
ast.source: A powerful alliance of wealthy traders and business interests
ast.target: 由富有商人和商业利益组成的强大联盟

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hidden religious order pursuing forbidden knowledge or dark powers
ast.target: 追求禁忌知识或黑暗力量的隐秘宗教组织

ast.name: description
ast.source: A resistance organization fighting against oppressive authority
ast.target: 对抗压迫性权威的抵抗组织

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hierarchical society based on land ownership and noble obligations
ast.target: 以土地所有权和贵族义务为基础的等级社会

ast.name: description
ast.source: A mobile society following herds and seasons across vast territories
ast.target: 在辽阔地域间随牧群与季节迁徙的流动社会

ast.name: description
ast.source: An agricultural economy based on land ownership and peasant labor
ast.target: 以土地所有权和农民劳动为基础的农业经济

ast.name: description
ast.source: A trade-focused economy where merchants wield significant power
ast.target: 以贸易为核心、商人拥有巨大权力的经济体系

ast.name: description
ast.source: Holy power granted by deities to their faithful servants
ast.target: 诸神赐予其忠诚仆从的神圣力量

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ancient power encoded in mystical symbols and inscriptions
ast.target: 蕴藏在神秘符号与铭文中的远古力量

ast.name: description
ast.source: An engaging first chapter that hooks readers and establishes the story
ast.target: 引人入胜的第一章，吸引读者并奠定故事基础

ast.name: description
ast.source: The peak of dramatic tension where the main conflict reaches its crisis point
ast.target: 戏剧张力的顶点，主要冲突达到危机点

ast.name: description
ast.source: The final chapter that ties up loose ends and shows the new status quo
ast.target: 收束伏笔并展示新现状的最终章节

ast.name: description
ast.source: A high-energy scene featuring combat, chase, or physical conflict
ast.target: 一个高能场景，包含战斗、追逐或肢体冲突

ast.name: description
ast.source: A conversation-driven scene revealing character and advancing plot
ast.target: 一个以对话为主的场景，揭示角色并推进情节

ast.name: description
ast.source: A scene where crucial information is discovered or revealed
ast.target: 一个发现或揭示关键信息的场景

ast.name: description
ast.source: A character-focused scene exploring feelings and relationships
ast.target: 一个以角色为中心的场景，探讨情感与关系

ast.name: description
ast.source: A reference document for a fictional language or naming conventions
ast.target: 虚构语言或命名规范的参考文档

ast.name: description
ast.source: A chronological reference document for historical events
ast.target: 历史事件的按时间顺序参考文档

ast.name: description
ast.source: Interactive map using OpenStreetMap tiles. Perfect for modern settings, historical fiction, or real-world locations.
ast.target: 使用 OpenStreetMap 瓦片的交互式地图。适用于现代背景、历史小说或真实世界地点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Image-based map perfect for fantasy worlds, continents, and large-scale regions. Upload your own map image.
ast.target: 基于图像的地图，适合奇幻世界、大陆和大范围区域。可上传你自己的地图图片。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Medium-scale map for kingdoms, provinces, or regional areas. Perfect for focusing on specific parts of your world.
ast.target: 中等尺度地图，用于王国、省份或区域。适合聚焦你世界的特定部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Detailed city or town map with districts, buildings, and points of interest. Great for urban adventures.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter the file name for each entity note that will be created. This will be the name of the markdown file (without .md extension).
ast.target: 为将创建的每个实体笔记输入文件名。这将是 Markdown 文件的名称（不含 .md 扩展名）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This event belongs to the following timeline eras based on its date:
ast.target: 此事件根据其日期属于以下时间线时代：

ast.name: text
ast.source: None (event date does not fall within any era)
ast.target: 无（事件日期不在任何时代内）

ast.name: text
ast.source: No timeline eras have been created yet. Use the "Manage timeline eras" command to create eras.
ast.target: 尚未创建时间线时代。使用“管理时间线时代”命令创建时代。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Assign this event to alternate timeline forks
ast.target: 将此事件分配到替代时间线分支

ast.name: text
ast.source: Failed to render timeline. This may be due to invalid date formats or vis-timeline configuration issues.
ast.target: 无法渲染时间线。可能是日期格式无效或 vis-timeline 配置问题导致。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Check the developer console (Ctrl+Shift+I) for more details.
ast.target: 查看开发者控制台（Ctrl+Shift+I）以获取更多详情。

ast.name: text
ast.source: An unexpected error occurred while rendering the timeline.
ast.target: 渲染时间线时发生了意外错误。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Timeline tracks allow you to view multiple filtered timelines simultaneously. Each track can show events for specific characters, locations, or custom criteria.
ast.target: 时间线轨道允许你同时查看多个筛选后的时间线。每条轨道可显示特定角色、地点或自定义条件的事件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No tracks created yet. Click "Add Track" to create your first timeline track.
ast.target: 尚未创建轨道。点击“添加轨道”创建你的第一条时间线轨道。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No conflicts match the selected filters.
ast.target: 没有冲突符合所选筛选条件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Automatically create timeline events from notes with specific tags. Events will be extracted based on your chosen date strategy.
ast.target: 自动从带有特定标签的笔记中创建时间轴事件。事件将根据你选择的日期策略提取。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No events to preview. Click "Generate Preview" to scan your notes.
ast.target: 没有可预览的事件。点击“生成预览”以扫描你的笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Organize your timeline into acts, arcs, or historical periods. Eras display as colored backgrounds on the timeline.
ast.target: 将你的时间轴组织为幕、篇章或历史时期。时代会在时间轴上显示为彩色背景。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No eras created yet. Click "Create New Era" to get started.
ast.target: 尚未创建任何时代。点击“创建新时代”开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Edit the markdown body content with sections (e.g., ## Description, ## Backstory).
ast.target: 编辑 Markdown 正文内容并分段（例如：## 描述、## 背景故事）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter options one per line. Users will choose from these values.
ast.target: 每行输入一个选项。用户将从这些值中选择。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No entities added yet. Add your first entity above.
ast.target: 尚未添加实体。在上方添加你的第一个实体。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No groups available. Create groups in the Groups section.
ast.target: 没有可用的分组。请在分组部分创建分组。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Error loading network graph. See console for details.
ast.target: 加载网络图出错。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ✅ No timeline conflicts detected! Your narrative is consistent.
ast.target: ✅ 未检测到时间线冲突！你的叙事一致。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Upload a file containing your story chapters.
ast.target: 上传包含你故事章节的文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Plain text (.txt) with chapter markers like "Chapter 1"
ast.target: 带有如“Chapter 1”章节标记的纯文本（.txt）

ast.name: text
ast.target: 带标题层级的 Markdown (.md)（# 第1章）

ast.name: text
ast.target: 带标题样式的 Word 文档 (.docx)

ast.name: text
ast.target: EPUB 电子书 (.epub) - 标准电子书格式

ast.name: text
ast.target: 带章节标记的 PDF 文档 (.pdf)

ast.name: text
ast.target: 带标题结构的 HTML 文件 (.html, .htm)

ast.name: text
ast.source: Rich Text Format (.rtf) with chapter markers
ast.target: 带章节标记的 RTF 富文本格式 (.rtf)

ast.name: text
ast.target: 带幕/场结构的 Fountain 剧本 (.fountain)

ast.name: text
ast.target: 带结构化章节数据的 JSON (.json)

ast.name: text
ast.source: No character or location names were detected in your text.
ast.target: 未在你的文本中检测到任何角色或地点名称。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can continue without entity linking, or go back and check your chapters.
ast.target: 你可以在不进行实体链接的情况下继续，或返回检查你的章节。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No writing session data available. Start tracking your writing sessions!
ast.target: 暂无写作会话数据。开始跟踪你的写作会话！

ast.name: text
ast.target: 尚未跟踪任何写作会话

ast.name: text
ast.source: Error rendering map. Check console for details.
ast.target: 渲染地图出错。查看控制台以获取详细信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tip: Use {{variableName}} in your note to create customizable fields.
ast.target: 提示：在你的笔记中使用 {{variableName}} 来创建可自定义字段。
